id: mqttconnevt

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Mqttconnevt"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/mqttConnEVT"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This event provides details about the connection state of a device, including its metadata and protocol versions.

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"default":{"description":"mqttConnEVT event payload","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"connectionState":{"type":"string","example":"CONNECTED","enum":["CONNECTED","DISCONNECTED"],"description":"Indicates the connection status of the device. Possible values are 'CONNECTED' or 'DISCONNECTED'."},"timestamp":{"type":"string","example":"12:17:56","format":"time","description":"The time at which the MQTT connection event occurred, formatted as HH:MM:SS."},"deviceModel":{"type":"string","example":"RFD40","enum":["RFD40","RFD90"],"description":"Specifies the model of the device involved in the MQTT connection event. Supported models are 'RFD40' and 'RFD90'."},"deviceSerialNo":{"type":"string","example":"RFD40-24190525100354","description":"The unique serial number of the device involved in the MQTT connection event."},"apiVersion":{"type":"number","example":"1.0","description":"The version of the API in use during the MQTT connection event."},"mqttVersion":{"type":"number","example":"3.1.1","description":"The version of the MQTT protocol being used for the connection."}}},"examples":{"example1":{"value":{"connectionState":"CONNECTED","timestamp":"12:17:56","deviceModel":"RFD40","deviceSerialNo":"RFD40-24190525100354","apiVersion":"1.0","mqttVersion":"3.1.1"}},"example2":{"value":{"connectionState":"DISCONNECTED","deviceModel":"RFD40","deviceSerialNo":"RFD40-24190525100354","apiVersion":1.2,"mqttVersion":3.0999999}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
